settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: We ship worldwide. Domestic orders typically arrive within 3–7 business days. International orders take 7–21 business days depending on location.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We accept returns within 30 days of purchase on unused items in original packaging. Contact us to initiate a return.

settings.question: How do I choose the right glove size?
settings.answer: Glove sizing is based on your body weight. Under 60kg: 10oz, 60–80kg: 12oz, 80kg+: 14–16oz.

settings.question: Do you offer discount codes?
settings.answer: Yes! Subscribe to our newsletter to receive exclusive discount codes. We also run seasonal sales.

settings.question: Can I track my order?
settings.answer: Yes. Once your order ships, you’ll receive a tracking number by email. You can also view order status in your account.

settings.heading: Contact & FAQ
settings.subheading: We’re here to help. Reach out or find your answer below.
settings.response_time: We typically respond within 24–48 hours, Monday–Friday.
